stories.title: Simplified 3-option discovery menu
stories.i_want: to see 3 clear, distinct options when I run /discover
stories.so_that: I can immediately choose the right path without confusion

stories.title: Dynamic recommended badge
stories.i_want: the menu to recommend Existing Project Analysis automatically
stories.so_that: I am guided to the most appropriate option without reading all descriptions

stories.title: Chat / Explore mode
stories.as_a: developer who wants to understand my project before committing to analysis
stories.i_want: a conversational mode where I can ask questions and explore without running the full workflow
stories.so_that: I can learn about my project's state, backlog, and architecture informally

stories.title: Remove confusing CLI flags
stories.i_want: only relevant CLI flags to be listed
stories.so_that: I am not confused by --scope, --target, --priority options that map to removed menu choices

stories.title: Correct menu-to-flow routing
stories.i_want: each option to route to the correct workflow flow
stories.so_that: my selection always leads to the expected behavior

stories.title: Clean up sub-agent scope references
stories.i_want: sub-agents to not reference removed --scope/--target parameters
stories.so_that: there are no dead code paths or confusing references in agent definitions
